description: Rewrite KVCache using type switches and string matching to avoid allocations and optimize DFS path tracking
Replace sort.Search with linear scan in findChild to optimize trie traversal
Optimize node splitting in insert by pre-building sorted children slices and avoiding addChild overhead
Skip commonPrefixLen calls for single-byte child segments in all trie operations
Add b0 byte field to trieCacheNode to eliminate slice data pointer dereferences during key searches
